meaning: n.一滴,一小滴水珠,(可塑性物质的)一团
examples: It probably feels like a little glob of water drop under your skin.
The Z shell has many unique glob operators.
You can also repeat glob operators as necessary.
Ginnie reached out and touched my arm with her fingers, left a track in the glob of white on my arm.
More accurately, it is a mountain of French fries topped with a steak, an egg and a piece of ham rolled around a glob of melted cheese.
